name: kitchenloop
description: An autonomous product-building loop for Claude Code — an implementation of the Kitchen Loop (arXiv:2603.25697) with spec-driven development routing and a gated merge pipeline.

scripts.lint: bash -c 'for f in $(find scripts .specify/scripts -name "*.sh"); do bash -n "$f" || exit 1; done; node --check scripts/kitchenloop/derive-coverage.mjs; echo "lint OK"'
